_about: Display manifest for the Clark House listing gallery. The website consumes this instead of hard-coding tags. Order = display order (hero first, lot last). 'alt' is for accessibility/SEO; 'caption' shows under/over the photo in the lightbox. Captions are written to the FSBO honesty guardrails (no claims that contradict what's visible; no unconfirmed counts). 2026-06-16: re-curated to the 17 re-edited 'mls_final' shots; room labels corrected after visual review (filenames 08/11/17 were misnamed). A backyard/lot shot was trialed but removed — the only available outdoor frames had blown-out skies.

_config.heroRule: Hero is the LCP image: render as a real , preload it, fetchpriority=high, do NOT lazy-load. Lazy-load every other photo.
_config.labelsNote: Filenames 08_primary_closet, 11_bedroom_2 and 17_bonus_room are misnamed by the editor's best-guess; verified against the footage and corrected here (08 = a secondary bedroom, 11 = the primary suite, 17 = the garage). 18_yard_lot is the prior set's lot shot, exposure/white-balance corrected to match the graded final set.
